name: KPI Management Commentary
description: Turn a raw KPI table or metrics export into board-ready management commentary: what changed, why it changed, what it means, and which actions follow — separating signal from noise.
author: accilium

variables.name: KPI_DATA
variables.description: The KPI table or metrics export (paste as text, CSV, or markdown table).

variables.name: PERIOD
variables.example: Q2 2026 vs. Q1 2026 and vs. plan

variables.name: BUSINESS_CONTEXT
variables.description: Known events that may explain movements (launches, price changes, outages, seasonality).
variables.example: Price increase of 8% effective April; major client onboarded in May; system outage June 12-14

example_input: KPI_DATA: revenue 4.2m vs 3.9m, churn 2.1% vs 1.6%; PERIOD: Q2 vs Q1; BUSINESS_CONTEXT: April price increase
